title: No Glint Written Books
description: Removes the annoying enchantment glint from Written Books!
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# 📕 No Glint Written Books
- **Removes glint from Written Books**, allowing you to see its texture in full glory
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
